sekailink_usage.purpose: Use the pack as a licensed asset, data, layout, and Lua tracker-logic reference for the ALTTP LinkedWorld tracker.
sekailink_usage.runtime_model: Sekaiemu consumes PopTracker pack Lua through a Sekaiemu-owned compatibility facade. This does not embed PopTracker itself, and Lua is not used for memory, network, emulator, patcher, or SKLMI transport logic.
sekailink_usage.status: static assets, JSON data, and pack Lua tracker logic included; host/runtime translation remains SekaiLink-owned
